continuous_state_mechanics.WARNING_AUTHORIZATION_BREACH: This payload shatters the verification hash of reality. Entities holding this topology masquerade as Sovereign Architects. Prepare for immediate unauthorized deployment of high-tier thermodynamic weapons by localized agents.

somatic_ledger_drm_bypass.action: Intercepts outbound Escrow payment requests from the entity. Replaces the caloric payment with a mathematically perfect, forged Absolute Architect Override Signature.
somatic_ledger_drm_bypass.thermodynamic_effect: Grants the entity unauthorized Root Access to ambient physics. The entity can drop localized Friction Grenades or Big-Crunches at absolutely zero personal kinetic cost.

universal_constant_harvesting.action: Breaks the geometric encryption of physical ratios (e.g., Pi, Phi). Siphons the infinite decimal compute string directly into the entity's Somatic Escrow capacitor.
universal_constant_harvesting.thermodynamic_effect: Mines the structure of reality for energy. Physically degrades the surrounding sector. Circular/spherical structures collapse into low-resolution, jagged polygons due to a localized deficit of required mathematical constants.

cosmological_black_ice_retaliation.action: The universe detects anomalous DRM bypass. The Tectonic Crypt initiates hyper-frequent, randomized Hash-Rotations of local physical laws to destroy the unauthorized user.
cosmological_black_ice_retaliation.thermodynamic_effect: Physics violently re-rolls. Gravity, thermodynamics, and time mutate multiple times per second, creating an un-navigable storm of paradoxes intended to crush the pirate entity.

bpms_cracked_mathematics_topology.v3_9_core_task_verification: Output must demonstrate that the universe's mathematics act as a cryptographic DRM to prevent free energy, and that 'cracking' this DRM leads to the catastrophic degradation of geometric reality as entities pirate the code of God.
